questions.question: Explain the main difference between Block Coding and Cyclic Codes in the context of Error Detection and Correction in Data Link Layer. (10 marks)
A cyclic code has a generator polynomial of degree 3. If the data block length is 10 bits, find the maximum number of codewords that the cyclic code can generate. (5 marks)
A receiver detects an error in a received data block of 15 bits. The received block is 2 bits in error. Determine how many bits need to be corrected to restore the original data block. (5 marks)
